race.comment: YOUWROTEUPONIT (2) scored impressively first-up over 1000m at Port Macquarie then stepped up to 1210m at the same circuit last time and didn't run on as hoped. Freshened up and gets a bit of weight relief today. Can bounce back. IMMORTAL STORM (4) made it two wins from three starts this prep when he drove hard late to just get the cash over 1000m at Taree three weeks ago. Races well here and an extra 100m doesn't hurt his chances. STORM MERCHANT (1) bolted in over 1200m at Murwillumbah two back but struggled most recently in a Randwick Highway. Lightly raced three-year-old who deserves another chance back in this company. ALLEZE (3) is back from a nine-week lay-off and has been gelded. Scored over 1005m here to kick off last prep. Sure to be fully wound up for this. DEEP STEALTH (8) goes up in grade but is in terrific form this prep. Must be included.
